title: Compliance: C replay.c replay protection
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.4. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/replay.c. Status: COMPLIANT. Uses 24-bit logical counter (epoch<<16|seqnum) at line 56-58. Half-space arithmetic (lines 94-101) handles 24-bit wrap. Old epochs rejected when counter falls below 64-slot window.
